title: Positive Flow: Navigate to Vocabulary Screen
test_steps: Open the Language Learning App. | Navigate to the Vocabulary section.
expected_result: The Vocabulary screen is displayed with the correct layout and content.

title: Positive Flow: Play the Key Phrase
test_steps: Ensure the Vocabulary screen is open. | Click on the circular play button.
expected_result: The audio for the key phrase 'content / contente' is played.

title: Positive Flow: Listen to the Key Phrase
test_steps: Ensure the Vocabulary screen is open. | Click on the 'LISTEN TO THE KEY PHRASE' button.
expected_result: The audio for the key phrase 'content / contente' is played.

title: Negative Flow: No Internet Connection
preconditions: Simulate a no internet connection scenario.
test_steps: Ensure the Vocabulary screen is open. | Simulate a no internet connection scenario.
expected_result: The Vocabulary screen displays a message indicating no internet connection.

title: Boundary/Validation: Progress Bar
test_steps: Ensure the Vocabulary screen is open. | Verify the progress bar indicates 1/11.

title: UI Test: Header Navigation
test_steps: Ensure the Vocabulary screen is open. | Click on the back arrow in the header.
expected_result: The app navigates back to the previous screen.

title: Accessibility Test: Play Button
test_steps: Ensure the Vocabulary screen is open. | Use accessibility features to interact with the play button.
expected_result: The audio for the key phrase 'content / contente' is played.

title: Usability Test: Call-to-Action Button
test_steps: Ensure the Vocabulary screen is open. | Click on the 'LISTEN TO THE KEY PHRASE' button.
expected_result: The audio for the key phrase 'content / contente' is played.

title: Usability Test: Progress Bar
test_steps: Ensure the Vocabulary screen is open. | Verify the progress bar indicates 1/11.

title: Usability Test: Header Navigation
test_steps: Ensure the Vocabulary screen is open. | Click on the back arrow in the header.
expected_result: The app navigates back to the previous screen.
